svg.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace
svg.text: All multi-byte integers are Little-Endian | Total frame length = 10 + payload_len bytes

g.text: Fixed Header (Magic + Length + Version + Type + Tag)

svg.text: All fixed-length fields use Little-Endian byte order | Gray boxes = header, Red boxes = CRC, Dashed box = empty payload
Frame length in header = 4 + payload_len | Minimum frame size = 10 bytes (M9P_FRAME_OVERHEAD)
